## Review checklist

### Contributor (or coding agent)

- [ ] Metadata frontmatter conforms to `schema/artifact-schema.md`
- [ ] Every factual claim has a source (SOURCES.md)
- [ ] No invented conservation claims; no animal "translation" claims
- [ ] ETHICS.md read and followed (required for any animal-interaction content)
- [ ] Style follows STYLE.md; internal/external links valid
- [ ] If AI-assisted: AGENTS.md rules followed

### Reviewers

- [ ] Sources verified (quality tier acceptable)
- [ ] Ethics review (if `review.ethics: required`)
- [ ] Science review (if science-sensitive)
- [ ] Editorial clarity

## Claims needing expert review

<!-- List anything you are uncertain about so reviewers can focus. -->
